title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data for robotics. Vera serves as a CPU layer for AI agents. Isaac GR00T is a humanoid robot reference platform. Together they form an integrated physical AI stack enabling embodied AI systems.
